seed_problem: Order n observations, each a discrete time-signal; cost = sum over consecutive pairs of the max convolution overlap of their signals; minimize total interference of the sequence.
mutation: composite: Hamiltonian-path sequencing (TSP-path) coupled with a 1-D discrete cross-correlation peak as the pairwise edge cost; edge metric is a max-over-shift coincidence count (number-theoretic/convolution twist), not a plain distance.
title: Dark-Sky Observatory: Interference-Minimizing Observation Schedule
strategies: identity/do-nothing baseline (input order, deliberately clustered => high interference)
nearest-neighbor path construction on the peak-coupling metric
nearest-neighbor + 2-opt local search with multiple deterministic restarts
cluster-aware dispersion: infer latent signature clusters and interleave them to maximize adjacent dissimilarity
